names.notes: Mobile Eats has an own-brand name and public surface, but no owner/operator or community naming decision receipt is present. The name cannot be launch-clear under the owner + community naming rule.

notes: This ledger is the mechanical brand naming provenance gate for the ZestStream holding-company goal.
A company name clears only when it is its own brand and has owner/operator plus community naming evidence.
This gate complements owner voice and POUR readiness; it proves naming provenance, not customer or operating-control status.
next_action: Attach owner/operator, community context, naming decision, brand identity, and public-surface refs before marking any company name or launch clear.
